name: @nsharir/human-feedback
description: Close the loop on AI agent output — compile .md / .html / .json files into interactive feedback surfaces. Install the /human-feedback command into Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, or Hermes.

scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:bundle
scripts.test: npm run build:all && node test/run.js && node test/annotator.js && node test/md-annotator.js && node test/installer.js && node test/version-check.js && node test/help-agents.js
